headerDisplay: Homebridge plugin for the IKEA DIRIGERA hub. Add one entry per hub on your local network. A token is highly recommended — without it, startup pauses until you press the hub's action button and the resolved token is printed in the logs.
footerDisplay: For advanced device overrides (e.g. exposing a device `asSwitch`), see the [README](https://github.com/matteovivona/homebridge-dirigera-ng#readme).

host.title: Host / IP
host.description: The host or IP address of the DIRIGERA hub on your local network.

token.title: Authentication Token
token.description: The hub authentication token. Highly recommended: without it, startup halts until you press the hub's action button, then the token is printed in the logs — copy it here to avoid re-pairing on every restart.

name.title: Name
name.description: Optional display name for the hub (used in logs). Defaults to the name reported by the hub.
